title: Time To Worship
html: INTRO: D9 C9 G/B D9 C9 G/B D9 C9 G/B D9 C9 G/B D9 Em7/D D9 I hear the voice of my beloved C9 Em7 D9 And he is rising up upon the mountains D9 Em7/D D9 With eyes of fire and feet of bronze C9 G/B His face is shinning like the sun C9 G/B And with his voice of many waters He calls me D9 C9 Rise up my darling Em7 D/F# Come away with me Bm7 C9 Let me listen to your voice Em7 D9 Let me listen to you sing D9 C9 Rise up my fair one Em7 D/F# Come way with me Bm7 C9 Let me listen to your voice Em7 D9 Come to worship your king Bridge: C9 G9/B D9 C9 G9/B D9 Em7/D D9 D9 The winter is past Em7/D D9 The rain is gone C9 Em7 D9 And the flowers are springing up D9 Em7/D D9 The singing of birds fills the earth C9 G9/B I am my beloved's C9 G9/B And my beloved's mine Solo: D9 C9 Em7 D/F# Bm7 C9 Em7 D9 D9 C9 Em7 D/F# Bm7 C9 Em7 G9 D9 D9 C9/D His name is holy Em7 D/F# The holy one of Israel Bm7 C9 His name is Jesus... D9 C9/D Em7 D/F# Holy, holy, holy, is the Lord God almighty And the earth is filled with his glory And my life is filled with his glory And my life is filled with his glory And my life will be filled with his glory Forever
